facts: NIT Agartala is a National Institute of Technology located in Jirania, Tripura, India.
Location: State Tripura, District West Tripura, Pincode 799046.
Aryabhatta Hostel is for boys. 2-sharing per room. Single room from 3rd year onwards.
RNT Hostel is for boys. 2-sharing per room. Single room from 3rd year onwards.
Gargi Hostel is for girls. 2-sharing per room.
No detailed mess menu provided by ambassador. Data gap — needs follow-up.

fee_structure.source: Student fee receipt (OBC/NCL student, 2024-29 batch, Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering). General category tuition fee not available from this receipt.
fee_structure.note: This receipt is for an OBC/NCL student. Tuition fee appears as Rs 0 (likely fee waiver). General category tuition fee is NOT available from this receipt.

variable_fees_per_sem.all_other_fees: Varies between Rs 2,425 and Rs 2,975 per semester.
variable_fees_per_sem.computerization_sbi_elec_fee: Varies: Rs 0 to Rs 1,085 depending on semester.

totals: OBC/NCL 1st semester total: Rs 37,125 (tuition waived for this student).
General category fees are not available from this receipt. The tuition fee for general category students is unknown from this data source.
fee_structure.late_fee: Rs 5,000 for first five days late, Rs 10,000 after that.

facts: WiFi provides 2 GB per day for phones and 3 GB per day for laptops.
Network is mostly 5G, sometimes 4G.
75% attendance is not mandatory at NIT Agartala.
Students can request to write semester examinations even without meeting 75% attendance.
Sports available: Cricket, Hockey, Volleyball, Kabaddi, Football, Badminton, Kho-Kho, Basketball, Table Tennis, and Tennis.
Nescafe cafe inside hostel, open from evening to night.
Food court available in the college.
No washing machines in the college.
Outside laundry service available; students have to pay.
No student elections at NIT Agartala.
Separate gyms for boys and girls.
Gym is free for all students.
Hospital available on campus.
In emergencies, an ambulance takes students to an outside hospital.
Medical fee: Rs 1,200 per semester.
Nearest airport: Bir Bikram Airport, Agartala (28 km).
Nearest railway station: Jirania Railway Station (3.1 km).
Nearest bus stand: Jirania Bus Stand (4 km).
Nearby restaurants: John Restaurant, Mark Restaurant.
Swiggy and Zomato are not available inside or near the college.
Late semester fee: Rs 5,000 for first five days late.
Rs 10,000 fine after five days late.
Climate at NIT Agartala is mostly sunny and rainy.
Home state language is Bengali.
Languages commonly spoken on campus: Telugu, Hindi, and English.
